description: John Zenon, a 35-year-old warehouse worker, was brought to the clinic after operating a propane forklift in a poorly ventilated area. He is experiencing a severe headache and dizziness. Clinical assessment reveals he is tachycardic and tachypneic. As the attending occupational health clinician, complete the clinical encounter in GNU Health. Document the condition as 'Toxic effect of carbon monoxide' (ICD-10 code T58) and perform a clinical evaluation documenting his acute presentation. Prescribe Paracetamol or Ibuprofen for his headache, order at least two baseline laboratory tests, and schedule a follow-up appointment for 1 to 5 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.
